steps.title: Identify the contradiction between texts
steps.content: Text 1 asserts that emotional contagion requires physical interaction and observing body language. Text 2 documents emotional contagion occurring through text-based social media posts where no physical interaction exists.

steps.title: Determine the researchers' assessment
steps.content:
Choice B correctly identifies that Text 1's view is incomplete—the Text 2 researchers found emotional contagion occurs without in-person interaction, which directly proves this. The other choices either misread Text 2's findings as unclear or primarily negative (C, D), or focus on a secondary detail like smiling (A) rather than the core issue about whether physical interaction is required.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
